Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know before you buy. Don't see your question? Email us.

Billing Security Integrations Support
Can I change plans later?

Any change takes effect at the start of the next billing cycle. Prorated credit is applied automatically for mid-cycle upgrades; downgrades keep the current tier until the cycle ends.

Do you offer a free trial?

Every plan includes a 14-day trial, no card required. At the end of the trial you can pick a paid plan, stay on the free tier, or walk away with no data loss — exports are available for 30 days after cancellation.

Is my data encrypted in transit and at rest?

Yes. All data moves over TLS 1.3 and is stored encrypted with AES-256. Enterprise workspaces can add customer-managed keys (CMEK) and per-region data residency.

How do exports work?

Everything exports: design tokens as CSS / Tailwind / Style Dictionary, components as HTML / React / Vue, assets as PNG / WebP / AVIF, and your whole workspace as a JSON archive you can import elsewhere.

Do you support single sign-on?

SAML and OIDC are available on the Team plan. SCIM 2.0 user provisioning ships with Enterprise. We've tested against Okta, JumpCloud, Google Workspace, Entra ID, and Auth0.

Can I self-host?

Self-hosted deployments are available to Enterprise customers with a signed MSA. The package runs on Kubernetes 1.27+ and includes its own Postgres, object-store, and Redis layers.

What happens if I cancel?

Your workspace stays accessible in a read-only state for 30 days. During that window you can export, invite a new owner, or re-subscribe without losing history. After 30 days the workspace is permanently deleted.

Is there a non-profit discount?

Yes — a 50% discount applies to registered 501(c)(3) organisations and the UK / EU equivalents. Send a link to your charity registration and we'll verify within one business day.
